reviews.comment:
Muy grande está estación baños super limpios mucho estacionamiento ,para comprar hay de todo full full la atención de los playeros de 10 para un viaje largo es el lugar para descansar y tomar algo hasta tiene canil para atar al perro

(Translated by Google)
This station is very large, the restrooms are super clean, there's plenty of parking, and it has everything you could want for shopping. The attendants are excellent; it's the perfect place to rest and have a drink on a long trip. It even has a dog run.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRd1l2Y1l3EAE

reviews.comment:
Tiene un lindo lugar para hacer una parada un poco más larga de lo común cuando viajas, tiene arboleda mesitas y canillas cerca, además de los servicios que presta la estación de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
It's a nice place to make a longer stop than usual when traveling. It has trees, tables, and taps nearby, in addition to the services provided by the gas station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNRcnBlQlhBEAE

reviews.comment:
Exelente atención, Muy buena la comida. Tiene parque, un restaurant con plaza blanda. Los baños limpios siempre.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, very good food. It has a park, a restaurant with a playground. The restrooms are always clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURnbC1PeVJnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención para mis pasajeros ya que fuimos con micro doble piso.  Excelente la variedad de productos que ofrecen.  Muy amables su personal.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service for my passengers, especially since we traveled on a double-decker bus. The variety of products they offer is excellent. Their staff is very friendly.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURnNTZHUzdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hermoso lugar, agua caliente para el mate gratis, fogones con parrilla, mesas lindo lugar para descansar.

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place, free hot water for mate, fire pits with grill, tables, nice place to rest.

reviews.comment:

They're very inexpensive and hot water is free for drinking mate.

reviews.comment:
Estacion Vintage , tratar de ir en el horario que duermen las moscas asi no molestan tanto . Te vas a una parrilla y te sale mas barato que un sandwich basico de los que ofrecen aca

(Translated by Google)
Vintage Station, try to go when the flies are asleep so they don't bother you so much. Go to a grill and it's cheaper than a basic sandwich like the ones they offer here.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNnOWR6aUVREAE

reviews.comment:
Me asombró la higiene de los baños. Agradecida x ello, xq no es común en la ruta encontrar baños asi. También sé que depende de las personas que lo usan si son cuidadosas o no. Pero estaba impecable y asi lo dejé. 👍😀🤷‍♀️

(Translated by Google)
I was amazed by the cleanliness of the restrooms. I was grateful for that, because it's not common to find restrooms like that along the route. I also know that it depends on the people using them and whether they're careful or not. But it was spotless, and I left it that way. 👍😀🤷‍♀️
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURnaGR5UE1BEAE
